entryExit.text:
Adseeds International (ADSE) — Entry / Exit Framework

Reduce / Trim: Above $12.04 — the stock is trading near or above the 52-week high. Capital should be rotated elsewhere.
Tighten or exit on any bounce above $12.98 — the risk/reward is poor at current levels.
Stop-loss (for remaining exposure): $14.41 — a close above the 52-week high would confirm the bull case is breaking down.
Target: $8.52 — partial mean reversion toward the middle of the 52-week range.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via DYOR HQ data pipeline (Google Sheets + Yahoo Finance). Fields include price, market capitalisation, 52-week range, P/E, EPS, and volume.
sources.companyFilings: Public company filings, regulatory announcements, investor presentations, and RNS where referenced in the analysis.
